project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Runway Real Storyboard Keyframe Single-Submit Authorization
scope: execute exactly one authorized Runway Gen-4.5 image-to-video canary using the R3-8D real storyboard keyframe
use provider=runway, endpoint=POST /v1/image_to_video, X-Runway-Version=2024-11-06, model=gen4.5, duration_seconds=2, ratio=720:1280, max_submit_calls=1
write a sanitized live result report
download and ffprobe validate provider output only if the provider succeeds
goal: Perform the one exact Jenn-authorized real storyboard keyframe Runway canary and stop after that one submit attempt.
acceptance: R3-8D report and selected app media artifact are verified before live submit.
RUNWAYML_API_SECRET presence is checked only as a boolean and secret value is not printed.
Exactly one Runway submit is attempted.
No RunningHub call, retry, regeneration, batch generation, publish, deploy, source overwrite, tag, release, or push occurs.
If provider succeeds, output is downloaded to data/media/provider-canary/r3-8d-real-keyframe/ and ffprobe validated.
If provider fails, sanitized provider failure evidence is recorded without raw payload or secret values.
failure_reason: Runway rejected the single authorized submit with sanitized provider evidence indicating insufficient credits.
safe_actions_completed: verified provider runway, model gen4.5, endpoint POST /v1/image_to_video, X-Runway-Version 2024-11-06, duration_seconds 2, and ratio 720:1280
performed exactly one authorized Runway submit
added local classification coverage for HTTP 400 credit messages
options_for_jenn: Top up or switch Runway account/credits, then provide a new exact authorization for another single-submit attempt.
Pause provider testing and keep the current sanitized failure evidence as R3-8E closeout.
next_safe_option: Do not perform another live Runway submit without a new exact current Jenn authorization phrase.
A future retry should be a new task because the R3-8E max_submit_calls=1 budget has been consumed as an attempt.
